hero.status: Second year vocational student · Open to internships
about.label: 01 - About Me
about.title: Hi, I'm Esra
about.p1: I am a second-year software development student in vocational school. I got excited about coding on my very first course and have been building personal projects in my free time ever since.
about.p2: I am especially interested in frontend development - I want to create clear and user-friendly interfaces. I keep learning new things and I am actively looking for an internship.
about.p3: In my free time I try new technologies, play video games, and drink too much coffee.
about.quote: "Every bug is a chance to learn something new."
skills.label: 02 - Skills
skills.title: Technologies
projects.label: 03 - Projects
projects.title: My Work
projects.items.weather.title: Weather App
projects.items.weather.desc: A weather app built with JavaScript and the OpenWeather API. It fetches real-time weather for any city.
projects.items.todo.title: Task List
projects.items.todo.desc: A React practice project where the user can add, delete, and mark tasks as done. Includes localStorage persistence.
projects.items.quiz.title: Quiz Bot
projects.items.quiz.desc: A Python-based command line quiz. Questions are read from a JSON file and scores are calculated automatically.
projects.items.portfolio.title: Portfolio Site v1
projects.items.portfolio.desc: My first portfolio website. Built with plain HTML and CSS without frameworks.

contact.lead: Internships, projects, or just a quick hello - send me a message!
